module.name: prefer-shortcut-return
module.description: Prefer shortcut boolean returns by replacing if/return true-false patterns with direct return expressions.

scenarios.name: should allow directly returning the condition expression
scenarios.given: return condition as the final statement of a function
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the return statement

scenarios.name: should allow an if with a non-boolean return in the consequent
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the if statement

scenarios.name: should report if (cond) return true; return false;
scenarios.given: an if statement whose consequent returns true and whose implicit alternative returns false
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the if statement

scenarios.name: should report if (cond) return false; return true;
scenarios.given: an if statement whose consequent returns false and the fallthrough returns true
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the if statement
